name: section-card
description: Section header plus bordered body card (`.section-card` in the web app).
notes: Figma component set 'Card' — export filenames map to variant folders (see section-card.md). Each variant folder also has default.png.
Stack gap between section cards (Main Content / Modules): mobile Figma space/4 (16dp) = --space-3; desktop space/6 (32dp) = --space-5. Header-to-body inside a card: space/1 (4dp).
accounts-investment / other-products: Overview main column; offers: Overview sidebar.
pending-payments: Payments main column; recurring-payments / recipients: Payments sidebar.
